title: senecio praealtus var. foliosus
intro: Senecio praealtus var. foliosus, also known as the tall groundsel, is a subspecies of the Senecio praealtus plant, which is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Senecio praealtus var. foliosus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as having antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Senecio praealtus var. foliosus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
